title: Day 30: Day 30 — Your Recruiting System
content:
# Day 30 — Your Recruiting System

## Topic
Pulling everything together into a repeatable recruiting machine

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Build an annual recruiting calendar:** Recruiting works better when outreach, events, follow-up, and reviews happen on a real rhythm.
- **Turn lessons into process:** Scripts, scorecards, onboarding steps, and follow-up sequences should live in a system, not just in your head.
- **Measure and refine continuously:** A recruiting system only improves if you track outcomes and adjust what’s weak.
- **Commit to 1% better:** Small improvements in targeting, messaging, and follow-through compound hard over time.
- **Consistency beats bursts:** You do not need random hype; you need a durable process that keeps producing conversations and hires.

## Why It Matters
A brokerage that treats recruiting like a system grows more predictably than one relying on occasional motivation. The real win is not one great hire — it’s building a machine that keeps generating the next one.
